message:
refactor(frankenterm-core): extract Export Query helpers into storage/export.rs (ft-nsb8c / ft-dn2tu Phase 5)

Phase 5 of the ft-dn2tu storage.rs split. Lifts the read-only export
query helpers (`build_export_where`, `query_export_segments`,
`query_export_gaps`, `query_export_workflows`, `query_export_sessions`,
`query_export_reservations`) out of storage.rs into the sibling file
`storage/export.rs`. ~340 LOC of production code, all read-side, no
writer-thread interaction.

Module wiring:

- New `mod export;` (private — production surface stays the async
  `StorageHandle::export_*` methods, not the raw query fns).
- Functions promoted from `fn` to `pub(super) fn` so storage.rs can
  reach them via `export::query_export_*`.
- Five call sites in `StorageHandle::export_*` updated to use the
  `export::` prefix.

Cross-module imports in `storage/export.rs`:
`use super::{AgentSessionRecord, ExportQuery, Gap, PaneReservation,
Segment, StorageError, WorkflowRecord, i64_to_usize,
u64_to_i64_unchecked};`. The two helpers stay in core because two
non-export where-clause builders (audit + stream-page) also use
`u64_to_i64_unchecked`.

Also fixes a pre-existing test-import gap in `recorder_retention.rs`
left over from the ft-xcsm0 / Phase 4 split (the test mod still
references `RecorderRedactionLevel` but the production-side
`use crate::recording::RecorderRedactionLevel;` was removed when the
DTOs moved). Added `use crate::recording::RecorderRedactionLevel;`
inside the `#[cfg(test)] mod tests` block.

Verification:

- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core --no-default-features` → clean
  (48.34s).
- `cargo check --workspace` → clean (2m40s).
- `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib --no-default-features 'export'`
  → 159 passed / 0 failed (covers the linter-co-extracted
  `export::tests::*` subtree plus the existing
  `runtime_telemetry::tests::proptest_export_jsonl_*`).

Shipping under disk-pressure timeout per orchestrator
ship-as-merge guidance — full proptest sweep deferred to next clean
build cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
